use_cases: Adding a lo-fi fuzzy noise texture effect to hero sections for visual depth and retro aesthetic
Enhancing dark-themed landing pages with a subtle animated overlay for visual interest
Creating a vintage CRT TV-style effect on any content wrapper for unique brand differentiation
Adding polish and texture to pricing or card components with a non-intrusive animated overlay
Applying ambient visual motion to SaaS product pages without distracting from content
ai_summary: A lightweight animated overlay component that applies a subtle lo-fi fuzzy noise texture effect using a repeating noise image and Framer Motion animation. The overlay continuously translates back and forth at low opacity (15%), creating a soft, analog TV-style visual effect. Designed as a drop-in wrapper component that enhances dark-themed UIs, hero sections, and landing pages with ambient motion and retro texture without distracting from underlying content.
